title: Automotive Configurator
description: Real-time 3D vehicle configurator with 200+ customization options. Built with React Three Fiber, custom PBR shaders, and a live price calculator.

title: Furniture Studio
description: AR-ready furniture configurator with real-time fabric, wood, and finish customization. Integrated with Shopify for direct-to-cart purchase.

title: Luxury Watch Builder
description: Hyper-realistic watch configurator with sub-millimeter precision rendering. Custom GLSL shaders simulate metal reflectivity and sapphire crystal refraction.

title: Architecture Visualizer
description: Real-time architectural walkthrough with day/night cycle, material swapping, and full environment simulation for pre-sale property tours.

title: Sneaker Configurator
description: Open-source sneaker customization tool. Users paint any part of the shoe in real-time using a custom 3D UV painting algorithm built from scratch.

title: 3D Art Gallery
description: First-person 3D art gallery with spatial audio, dynamic lighting, and NFT integration. Walk through curated exhibitions entirely in the browser.
